name: Western Union
description_short: San Diego's Western Union at 3550 Murphy Canyon Rd offers check cashing and money transfers seven days a week.
description_long:
Western Union's San Diego location at 3550 Murphy Canyon Rd operates as a standalone check-cashing store in the Murphy Canyon area. This branch is open Monday through Sunday from 8 AM to 8 PM, making it accessible for check deposits, money transfers, and financial services during extended hours.

At this San Diego Western Union location, you can send money domestically and internationally, cash checks, pay bills, and access other financial services. For questions about transfer fees, delivery times, and service options, call +1 858-292-5007 before your visit.

For San Diego, CA residents heading to Murphy Canyon Rd, this Western Union branch serves as a convenient stop for urgent financial needs. Bring a valid government-issued ID and documentation for international transfers or larger check-cashing transactions.
address: 3550 Murphy Canyon Rd, San Diego, CA 92123

company_info.headquarters: 3550 Murphy Canyon Rd, San Diego, CA 92123

pros: 24/7 online transaction initiation on WU.com with flexibility to pay in-store during agent hours
Extensive physical agent network with 150+ locations across major US retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger)
Multi-language platform support including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Multiple payout options including cash pickup, direct card deposit, and money order services
Integrated rewards program and referral incentives for frequent users
Transfer tracking capability to monitor money in transit
Mobile top-up service enabling international phone credit purchases
cons: Transaction fees not transparent on website; consumers must contact specific agents or visit WU.com to learn costs
Cash pickup limited by agent location hours (many locations close 8 PM-10 PM or earlier), creating access barriers for some consumers
Technical issues noted during website review (Orange Wallet unavailable, 404 errors on secondary pages)
Service completion requires physical store visit during business hours despite 24/7 online initiation
No indication of competitive pricing or rate comparison tools to help consumers evaluate value
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending remittances to family internationally
Consumers without traditional bank accounts seeking cash payment and pickup options
Users in rural or underserved areas with convenient grocery store or retail partner locations
Individuals needing bill payment or mobile top-up services alongside money transfer capability
diagnosis: Western Union is best for immigrants, unbanked consumers, and international remittance senders who value physical cash pickup combined with online transaction convenience. The primary caveat is that actual cost depends entirely on transaction type and destination, with fees not visible on the main website—consumers must check specific locations or use the pricing tool, and evening/night transactions may be impossible depending on agent partner hours.
services: Online money transfer initiation (24/7 via WU.com)
In-store cash payment and money order processing
Receiver management and multiple recipient accounts
Delivery method updates and price estimation tools
meta_description: San Diego Western Union at 3550 Murphy Canyon Rd, CA. Check cashing, money transfers, and bill pay—open daily 8AM-8PM.
